title: Cobblemon: Perfect Ninetales (Discontinued)
description: Have you ever hoped your Ninetales was actually good? Overpowered, even?
body:
# **Discontinued**
**This pack is no longer being updated.** I will not offer support nor bug fixes for it; it should work as is, but do not expect anything more.


<details>
<summary>Old Description</summary>


## Perfect Ninetales

Have you ever hoped your Ninetales was actually good? Overpowered, even? Well, I have, and I made a pack that aims to offer just that. Editing things such as its typing, base stats, ability, and learn set, making it actually good.

---

### **| New Typing:**
Fire / Psychic

### **| New Base Stats:**
73 / 50 / 75 / 105 / 105 / 110

### **| New Ability:**
Prankstar

### **| New Moves:**
Mystical Fire, Psychic, Shadow Ball, Sunny Day, Burning Jealousy, Dark Pulse, Energy Ball, Dazzling Gleam


## FAQ

### **| What versions work?:** 
This pack is made for [Cobblemon 1.7](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), it may not work with older versions of the mod (nor can I offer support for older versions). Sometimes it says the pack is "not for this version of Minecraft" when using it on the right version, just ignore it, it works just fine.

### **| Can I use the edits from this pack in my own modpack or addon?:**
As long as I'm given credit, yes. Be sure that said credit is not hidden or easy to miss.

### **| Can I use this pack in my Minecraft Server?:**
Yes, however, it must not be locked behind ANY paid content. It also cannot be locked behind "votes".

### **| My game crashed when I tried loading it, why?:**
You most likely tried using the pack as a Resource Pack, which will crash your game. It is a Data Pack, and you must use it as such.

</details>
